description: Get ready to celebrate the upcoming holiday season with a special New Year event. This December, enjoy a prime selection of music tracks and a curated Spotify playlist to set the mood for New Year's Eve. Uncover a treasure trove of discounts in our seasonal sales event on Apple devices and subscriptions. Shop till you drop while enjoying your favorite tunes. Also, don't miss the chance to download exclusive videos and content as part of this grand celebration. Embrace the spirit of the season and the beginning of a new year with our special offerings. All of this is available in a sleek, dark mode interface, ensuring a seamless browsing experience. So, gear up for a memorable end of the year with our exciting event.
short_description: Start the New Year with our "Year of Lights" email template. Get prime discounts on Apple products and shop seasonal sales this December. Enjoy curated Spotify tracks and exclusive video content. Perfect for events, media, and entertainment in dark mode.

designer.description: My name is Darko Kosanin. I like to turn ideas into something visible. I feel great pleasure when I create something new, using various shapes and combinations of colors, fonts and elements into a new and original design. I am also a web developer, so I turn the design into codes with the same pleasure.
